name: Ownable (access control)
description: Single-owner access control. One account is the owner; ownership can be handed off in a safe two-step transfer. Use for: an admin/ownership primitive or a simple 'who controls this' page. NOT a general app on its own — it has no business logic, counters or storage beyond the owner.

methods.name: transfer_ownership
methods.description: Start handing ownership to a new address. OWNER ONLY.

methods.name: accept_ownership
methods.description: New owner accepts the pending transfer.

methods.name: renounce_ownership
methods.description: Give up ownership permanently. OWNER ONLY.
